mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_id, status, total_amount, total_currency, postal_code, prefecture, city, street, payment_id, created_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, customer_id, status, total_amount, total_currency, postal_code, prefecture, city, street, payment_id, created_at FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( id, customer_id, status, total_amount, total_currency, postal_code, prefecture, city, street, payment_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{customerId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{totalCurrency}, #{postalCode}, #{prefecture}, #{city}, #{street}, #{paymentId}, #{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
